base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghini_fly — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Ghini — white ghost with sad face. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ghini — white ghost with sad face; 2-frame hover. Drifts through graveyard; invulnerable while main Ghini lives, only defeatable by hitting original
